creator: rea-fbsd@codelabs.ru
text:
There is a good Trac plugin that adds more flexible notification
system -- TracAnnouncer.

Fix: 

The shar archive for the new port is available at the following URL:
  http://codelabs.ru/fbsd/ports/trac-announcer/new-port.shar

The port itself was tested on our Trac 0.12 instance and passed Tinderbox
builds for 7.x, 8.x and 9.x; both tests went without any issues.

However, this port wants Babel, so it should be committed only after
ports/150483 will be resolved, because if users will install this port
it can break Trac installations that were built without devel/py-babel
in the system.
